name: Resume Builder
description: Generate a professional, ATS-friendly resume tailored to a job description with accomplishments-focused bullets and measurable outcomes.
exampleInput:
Role: Senior Product Manager
Experience: 6 years at B2B SaaS
Achievements: Led migration project that reduced costs by 18%
Goal: Apply to Strategy and Operations roles
exampleOutput: <structured resume with summary, experience, skills, and 5-7 achievement bullets per role formatted for ATS>
tips: Provide a job posting to tailor the resume
Ask the model to vary tone: concise, narrative, or achievement-first

name: Presentation Generator
description: Create a complete slide deck outline, speaker notes, and design guidance from a short brief or an article.
exampleInput:
Topic: Q3 Product Launch Plan
Audience: Executive leadership
Length: 12 slides
exampleOutput: <slide titles, bullets, speaker notes, recommended visuals per slide>
tips: Provide the objective and desired call-to-action
Request an executive summary slide first
Ask for visual suggestions (charts, diagrams, screenshots)

name: Infographic Creator
description: Design an infographic brief including a headline, sections, data callouts, color palette, and concise copy suitable for designers or image models.
exampleInput:
Topic: The ROI of Content Marketing
Key metrics: CAC, LTV, conversion rate
exampleOutput: <headline, three-panel layout suggestion, data callouts, short copy for each panel, suggested iconography>
tips: Provide up to 5 key data points
Ask for recommended color palettes and font pairings
Export as short prompts for image models

name: HandwrittenNotesImage
description: Generate a premium handwritten study notes prompt that instructs image models to render realistic notebook styling, diagrams, highlights, and callouts.
exampleInput: Topic: Photosynthesis process – explain steps and include labelled diagram
exampleOutput: <image prompt for Midjourney or Stable Diffusion producing a photorealistic notebook page with handwriting, boxed key terms, and simple diagram>
tips: Mention paper texture, pen type, and ink color
Ask for labeled diagram and callouts with arrows
Specify aspect ratio for notes (e.g., 4:3) for legibility

name: Excel Formula Expert
description: Create advanced Excel formulas, combine with helper columns, and produce sample data and step-by-step formula explanation.
exampleInput: Goal: Calculate rolling 12-month retention rate by cohort from event logs
exampleOutput: <array formulas, pivot-friendly layout, helper columns, sample results>
tips: Provide sample rows or a CSV snippet
Ask for both formula and plain-English explanation
